name: pi-bio-workbench
author: Sounkou Mahamane Toure
description: Application workbench for source-pinned variant evidence, clinical composition, review, and agent-host interaction.

scripts.test: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run check:manifest && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:web
scripts.demo:clinical: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run
scripts.provision:ducknng: node --input-type=module -e "import {DuckDBInstance} from '@duckdb/node-api'; const c=await(await DuckDBInstance.create(':memory:')).connect(); await c.run('INSTALL ducknng FROM community;'); await c.run('LOAD ducknng;'); console.log('ducknng installed + loaded');"
scripts.provision:duckhts: node --input-type=module -e "import {DuckDBInstance} from '@duckdb/node-api'; const c=await(await DuckDBInstance.create(':memory:')).connect(); await c.run('INSTALL duckhts FROM community;'); await c.run('LOAD duckhts;'); console.log('duckhts installed + loaded');"
scripts.test:web: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && playwright test
